cpi_inflation: CPI source=official_censtatd_510_60001_1998-01-01_2026-01-01; lineage_file=data/cpi_lineage.csv; official_window=1998-01-01 to 2026-01-01; official_share_full=100.0%; official_share_sample=100.0%; C&SD table 510-60001 Composite CPI YoY monthly -> quarterly mean; WB annual spline only if official CPI unavailable
unemployment: C&SD table 210-06101 (SAUR/UR M3M -> quarterly end-of-quarter last, avoids double-smoothing of overlapping M3M windows)
hibor_3m: HKMA hibor.fixing endperiod API (monthly -> quarterly mean); falls back to data/hibor_3m_quarterly.csv or the existing canonical panel if HKMA temporarily times out
china_gdp: OECD QNA CHN.B1_GE.GPSA.Q, B1GQ (GDP at market prices), GY transformation (YoY % growth), quarterly; falls back to FRED CHNGDPNQDSMEI nominal CNY GDP YoY if OECD unavailable
hk_exports_china_yoy: C&SD table 410-50013: total exports to Chinese Mainland, monthly YoY % -> quarterly mean; cached to data/hk_exports_china_quarterly.csv
